name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling and 14 historical card-version upgrades share a persistent 35-point budget. v0.8.0 audits the restored StS1 card effects and fixes Electrodynamics for both passive and evoked Lightning against all enemies, restores Recycle's hand selection and X-cost refund, corrects Lock-On's 1.5x multiplier and enemy-turn duration, and limits Static Discharge to unblocked attack damage.
